data.title: FIT Hon Teng Limited Reports Strong Financial Growth in 2024
data.description:
FIT Hon Teng Limited ( (HK:6088) ) just unveiled an announcement.

FIT Hon Teng Limited reported a revenue increase of 6.1% to US$4,451 million for the year ending December 31, 2024, with profits rising by 19.1% to US$154 million. Despite the financial growth, the company did not declare a final dividend for the year, indicating a strategic focus on reinvestment or other financial priorities. This performance underscores the company’s solid positioning in the interconnect technology market, reflecting its ability to enhance profitability and shareholder value amid competitive industry conditions.

More about FIT Hon Teng Limited

FIT Hon Teng Limited, incorporated in the Cayman Islands and operating in Hong Kong, is a company engaged in the interconnect technology industry. It primarily focuses on providing innovative interconnect solutions, which are crucial for various electronic devices and systems.

data.title: Silver Bullet Mines Corp Grants Options to Consultant
data.description:
Silver Bullet Mines Corp ( (TSE:SBMI) ) has shared an announcement.

Silver Bullet Mines Corp has announced the granting of one million options to a consultant, with an exercise price of twenty cents, immediate vesting, and a term of four weeks. This move could potentially impact the company’s operational strategy by aligning consultant interests with company performance, possibly influencing its market positioning and stakeholder relations.

More about Silver Bullet Mines Corp

Silver Bullet Mines Corp is a company involved in the mining industry, focusing on the exploration and development of mineral resources. The company is listed on the TSX Venture Exchange and OTCQB, indicating its engagement in capital markets and potential growth opportunities within the mining sector.

data.title: Siemens Energy AG Announces Change in Voting Rights Structure
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Siemens Energy ( (DE:ENR) ).

Siemens Energy AG announced a change in its voting rights structure, with the State of Norway’s Ministry of Finance reducing its stake from 3.07% to 2.88%. This adjustment in shareholding reflects a minor shift in the company’s ownership, which could influence its governance and decision-making processes.

More about Siemens Energy

Siemens Energy AG is a leading player in the energy sector, headquartered in Munich, Germany. The company specializes in providing energy solutions and services, focusing on sustainable and efficient energy technologies. It operates in various markets, including regulated and free markets across major German cities.

data.title: Vesuvius CFO’s Family Acquires Company Shares, Indicating Confidence
data.description:
An update from Vesuvius ( (GB:VSVS) ) is now available.

Vesuvius plc has announced a transaction involving the purchase of its shares by connected persons of its Chief Financial Officer, Mark Collis. The transaction, conducted on the London Stock Exchange, involved the acquisition of 5,027 shares at an aggregated price of £4.0499. This move reflects internal confidence in the company’s market position and future prospects, potentially signaling positive sentiment to stakeholders.

Vesuvius plc operates in the engineering sector, specializing in the production of advanced ceramics and refractory products for high-temperature industrial processes. The company primarily serves the steel and foundry industries, providing essential materials that enhance the efficiency and sustainability of metal production.

data.title: CAP-XX and SCHURTER Forge Strategic Partnership in Energy Storage
data.description:
CAP-XX Ltd ( (GB:CPX) ) has issued an announcement.

CAP-XX Limited has entered into a strategic Technology Cooperation Agreement with SCHURTER AG to enhance their market position in the energy storage sector. This partnership aims to leverage synergies in research, development, manufacturing, and sales to drive innovation and efficiency. The collaboration will focus on energy storage technologies, with SCHURTER providing an innovation platform for idea sharing. This agreement is expected to accelerate the development of advanced technologies and strengthen both companies’ positions in the global market.

More about CAP-XX Ltd

CAP-XX Limited is a leader in the design and manufacture of thin, flat supercapacitors and energy management systems. These products are used in portable and small-scale electronic devices, as well as larger applications like automotive and renewable energy. CAP-XX’s supercapacitors are known for their high-power density and energy storage capacity, making them essential for power-hungry consumer and industrial electronics.

data.title: Silver Dollar Resources Appoints New CEO, Gregory Lytle
data.description:
Silver Dollar Resources ( (TSE:SLV) ) has issued an update.

Silver Dollar Resources Inc. has announced a significant management change with the appointment of Gregory Lytle as the new president and CEO, succeeding Michael Romanik who will remain on the board. This transition is expected to leverage Lytle’s extensive experience in corporate communications and advisory services, potentially strengthening the company’s strategic positioning and operational focus in the mineral exploration industry.

More about Silver Dollar Resources

Silver Dollar Resources Inc. is a mineral exploration company focused on North America’s premier mining regions, including Idaho’s Silver Valley and the Durango-Zacatecas silver-gold belt. The company holds a portfolio of projects such as the advanced-stage Ranger-Page and La Joya projects, and the early-stage Nora project. With financial backing from renowned mining investor Eric Sprott, Silver Dollar is committed to an aggressive growth strategy, actively seeking drill-ready projects in mining-friendly jurisdictions.

data.title: Tower Semiconductor and OpenLight Unveil 400G Modulator for Next-Gen Optical Connectivity
data.description:
Tower ( (TSEM) ) has provided an announcement.

On March 12, 2025, Tower Semiconductor and OpenLight announced the successful demonstration of a 400G/lane modulator built on Tower’s silicon photonics platform, PH18DA. This innovation supports next-generation 400G/lane optical communication architectures for data centers and AI applications, offering a scalable solution from 100G to 400G. The collaboration aims to provide a cost-effective and high-performance solution for high-speed data transfer, addressing the industry’s need for efficient silicon-based modulators. This development marks a significant step in advancing high-speed networking and optical communication technology, enhancing Tower’s industry positioning and offering stakeholders a reliable path to future-proof designs.

More about Tower

Tower Semiconductor Ltd. is a leading foundry of high-value analog semiconductor solutions, offering technology, development, and process platforms for various markets including consumer, industrial, automotive, mobile, infrastructure, medical, and aerospace and defense. The company is committed to creating a sustainable impact through innovative analog technology and provides a wide range of customizable process platforms. Tower Semiconductor operates multiple facilities worldwide to ensure multi-fab sourcing and extended capacity for its customers.

YTD Price Performance: -28.52%

Average Trading Volume: 810,865

Current Market Cap: $4.09B
